pi_items.metadata_value: Real intraoperative vital signs recordings from VitalDB
pi_items.verified_value: VitalDB - Seoul National University Hospital (6,388 noncardiac surgeries, August 2016 - June 2017)
pi_items.source: Web search of VitalDB documentation and Nature Scientific Data publication

privileged_info_summary: This task audits arterial pressure monitoring across three real intraoperative vital signs recordings from the VitalDB dataset (Seoul National University Hospital). Case 0001 contains invasive arterial pressure monitoring (SNUADC/ART track), while cases 0002 and 0003 use non-invasive blood pressure (NIBP) monitoring. All three cases are from real noncardiac surgeries. The agent must identify which case has ART, export its data, and document the clinical rationale for invasive hemodynamic monitoring. The pass threshold is 60/100 points.
